revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月29日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の29日目である。年によっては9月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[747年]][[11月6日]]） - [[東大寺]]大仏の鋳造を開始 * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[11月4日]]） - [[執権]]・[[北条時政]]が将軍・[[源頼家]]を[[伊豆国|伊豆修善寺]]に幽閉 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1681年]][[11月9日]]） - [[辛酉革命]]のため[[延宝]]から天和に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月28日]]） - [[徳川慶喜]]、[[江戸幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1913年]]） * 天保14年（閏9月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月20日]]） - [[品川弥二郎]]、[[長州藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1900年]]） * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[11月20日]]） - [[黒岩涙香]]、新聞記者・[[小説家]]（+ [[1920年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[11月17日]]） - [[内田康哉]]、[[外交官]]･[[政治家]]（+ [[1936年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[延長 (元号)|延長]]8年（ユリウス暦[[930年]][[10月23日]]） - [[醍醐天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Daigo Daigo emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、60代[[天皇]]（* [[885年]]） * [[天暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[949年]][[10月23日]]） - [[陽成天皇]]、57代天皇（* [[868年]]） * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[10月13日]]） - [[織田信広]]、[[武将]] * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[10月29日]]） - [[柳原資廉]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月5日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1730年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月29日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の29日目である。年によっては9月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[747年]][[11月6日]]） - [[東大寺]]大仏の鋳造を開始 * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[11月4日]]） - [[執権]]・[[北条時政]]が将軍・[[源頼家]]を[[伊豆国|伊豆修善寺]]に幽閉 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1681年]][[11月9日]]） - [[辛酉革命]]のため[[延宝]]から天和に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月28日]]） - [[徳川慶喜]]、[[江戸幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1913年]]） * 天保14年（閏9月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月20日]]） - [[品川弥二郎]]、[[長州藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1900年]]） * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[11月20日]]） - [[黒岩涙香]]、新聞記者・[[小説家]]（+ [[1920年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[11月17日]]） - [[内田康哉]]、[[外交官]]･[[政治家]]（+ [[1936年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[延長 (元号)|延長]]8年（ユリウス暦[[930年]][[10月23日]]） - [[醍醐天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Daigo Daigo emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、60代[[天皇]]（* [[885年]]） * [[天暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[949年]][[10月23日]]） - [[陽成天皇]]、57代天皇（* [[868年]]） * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[10月13日]]） - [[織田信広]]、[[武将]] * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[10月29日]]） - [[柳原資廉]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月5日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1730年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

== 忌日 == * [[延長 (元号)|延長]]8年（ユリウス暦[[930年]][[10月23日]]） - [[醍醐天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Daigo Daigo emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、60代[[天皇]]（* [[885年]]） * [[天暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[949年]][[10月23日]]） - [[陽成天皇]]、57代天皇（* [[868年]]） * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[10月13日]]） - [[織田信広]]、[[武将]] * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[10月29日]]） - [[柳原資廉]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月5日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1730年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar September]]

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September29日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の29日目である。年によっては9月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[747年]][[11月6日]]） - [[東大寺]]大仏の鋳造を開始 * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[11月4日]]） - [[執権]]・[[北条時政]]が将軍・[[源頼家]]を[[伊豆国|伊豆修善寺]]に幽閉 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1681年]][[11月9日]]） - [[辛酉革命]]のため[[延宝]]から天和に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月28日]]） - [[徳川慶喜]]、[[江戸幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1913年]]） * 天保14年（閏9月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月20日]]） - [[品川弥二郎]]、[[長州藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1900年]]） * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[11月20日]]） - [[黒岩涙香]]、新聞記者・[[小説家]]（+ [[1920年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[11月17日]]） - [[内田康哉]]、[[外交官]]･[[政治家]]（+ [[1936年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[延長 (元号)|延長]]8年（ユリウス暦[[930年]][[10月23日]]） - [[醍醐天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Daigo Daigo emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、60代[[天皇]]（* [[885年]]） * [[天暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[949年]][[10月23日]]） - [[陽成天皇]]、57代天皇（* [[868年]]） * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[10月13日]]） - [[織田信広]]、[[武将]] * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[10月29日]]） - [[柳原資廉]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月5日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1730年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}}, then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}}, then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}}19年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu (【Izu Shūzenji】). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}}, the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}14年（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}}, a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}}, a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}}, a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}}, in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}}). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}}, the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}}). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}}, a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}}, a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}}, then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}}, then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}}19年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu (【Izu Shūzenji】). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}}, the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}14年（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}}, a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}}, a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}}, a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}}, in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}}). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}}, the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}}). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}}, a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}}, a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}}).

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}}, then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}}, then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}}19年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu (【Izu Shūzenji】). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}}, the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}14年（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}}, a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}}, a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}}, a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}}, in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}}). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}}, the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}}). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}}, a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}}, a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}}).

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}}, then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}}, then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.

[[sn:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}}, then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}}, then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}}19年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}}). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}}, the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}14年（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}}, a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}}, a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}}, a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}}8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}}, in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}}). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}}, the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}}). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}}, a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}}, a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}}).

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}}, then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}}, then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}}19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}}). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}}, the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}}, a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}}, a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}}, a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}}8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}}, in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}}). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}}3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}}, the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}}). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}}, a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}}, a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}}, a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[September 29 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ). == See Also ==

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ). == See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).

[[sn:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿九]] [[zh:九月廿九]] [[en:draft:September 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|747|ja|747}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|930|ja|930}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|949|ja|949}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎|12=draft}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香|12=draft}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉|12=draft}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|930|ja|930|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|12=draft}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|949|ja|949|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇|12=draft}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広|12=draft}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=draft}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730|12=draft}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香|12=draft|12=draft}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|930|ja|930|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|949|ja|949|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft|12=draft}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香|12=draft|12=draft}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|747|ja|747|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|ja|北条時政|12=draft|12=draft}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|ja|源頼家|12=draft|12=draft}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1681|ja|1681|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1837|ja|1837|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|ja|1913|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1843|ja|1843|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|ja|品川弥二郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|ja|1900|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1862|ja|1862|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Ruika|ja|黒岩涙香|12=draft|12=draft}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|ja|1920|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Yasuya|ja|内田康哉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|ja|1936|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|930|ja|930|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|ja|885|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|949|ja|949|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Yōsei|ja|陽成天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|ja|868|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1574|ja|1574|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信広|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander. * {{ill|Shōtoku (Japan)|ja|正徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1712|ja|1712|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|ja|享和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1801|ja|1801|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|ja|本居宣長|12=draft|12=draft}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|ja|1730|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月29日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の29日目である。年によっては9月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[747年]][[11月6日]]） - [[東大寺]]大仏の鋳造を開始 * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[11月4日]]） - [[執権]]・[[北条時政]]が将軍・[[源頼家]]を[[伊豆国|伊豆修善寺]]に幽閉 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1681年]][[11月9日]]） - [[辛酉革命]]のため[[延宝]]から天和に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月28日]]） - [[徳川慶喜]]、[[江戸幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1913年]]） * 天保14年（閏9月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月20日]]） - [[品川弥二郎]]、[[長州藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1900年]]） * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[11月20日]]） - [[黒岩涙香]]、新聞記者・[[小説家]]（+ [[1920年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[11月17日]]） - [[内田康哉]]、[[外交官]]･[[政治家]]（+ [[1936年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[延長 (元号)|延長]]8年（ユリウス暦[[930年]][[10月23日]]） - [[醍醐天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Daigo Daigo emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、60代[[天皇]]（* [[885年]]） * [[天暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[949年]][[10月23日]]） - [[陽成天皇]]、57代天皇（* [[868年]]） * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[10月13日]]） - [[織田信広]]、[[武将]] * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[10月29日]]） - [[柳原資廉]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月5日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1730年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月29日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の29日目である。年によっては9月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]19年（[[ユリウス暦]][[747年]][[11月6日]]） - [[東大寺]]大仏の鋳造を開始 * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[11月4日]]） - [[執権]]・[[北条時政]]が将軍・[[源頼家]]を[[伊豆国|伊豆修善寺]]に幽閉 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1681年]][[11月9日]]） - [[辛酉革命]]のため[[延宝]]から天和に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月28日]]） - [[徳川慶喜]]、[[江戸幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1913年]]） * 天保14年（閏9月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月20日]]） - [[品川弥二郎]]、[[長州藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1900年]]） * [[文久]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1862年]][[11月20日]]） - [[黒岩涙香]]、新聞記者・[[小説家]]（+ [[1920年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[11月17日]]） - [[内田康哉]]、[[外交官]]･[[政治家]]（+ [[1936年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[延長 (元号)|延長]]8年（ユリウス暦[[930年]][[10月23日]]） - [[醍醐天皇]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Daigo Daigo emperor of Japan] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、60代[[天皇]]（* [[885年]]） * [[天暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[949年]][[10月23日]]） - [[陽成天皇]]、57代天皇（* [[868年]]） * [[天正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1574年]][[10月13日]]） - [[織田信広]]、[[武将]] * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[10月29日]]） - [[柳原資廉]]、[[公卿]]（* [[1644年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月5日]]） - [[本居宣長]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1730年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 29|qq=September 29}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 19th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:747|747]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） – Regent [[:en:Hōjō Tokimasa|Hōjō Tokimasa]] confined Shogun [[:en:Minamoto no Yoriie|Minamoto no Yoriie]] to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1681|1681]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|qq=}} .
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († [[:en:1913|1913]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year（閏9月）（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） – [[:en:Shinagawa Yajirō|Shinagawa Yajirō]] , a Chōshū retainer and politician († [[:en:1900|1900]] ). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） – [[:en:Kuroiwa Shūroku|Kuroiwa Ruika]] , a journalist and novelist († [[:en:1920|1920]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Uchida Kōsai|Uchida Yasuya]] , a diplomat and politician († [[:en:1936|1936]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō (era)|qq=}} 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:930|930]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Daigo]] , in his 60s (* [[:en:885|885]] ). * [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:949|949]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Yōzei|Yōsei]] , the 57th emperor (* [[:en:868|868]] ). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1574|1574]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobuhiro|Oda Nobuhide]] , a military commander. * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (Japan)]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1712|1712]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagihara Sukenori|qq=}} , a court noble (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ). * [[:en:Kyōwa|Kyōwa]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Motoori Norinaga|Motoori Norinaga]] , a kokugakusha (* [[:en:1730|1730]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .

== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († [[:en:1913|1913]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year（閏9月）（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） – [[:en:Shinagawa Yajirō|Shinagawa Yajirō]] , a Chōshū retainer and politician († [[:en:1900|1900]] ). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1862|1862]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） – [[:en:Kuroiwa Shūroku|Kuroiwa Ruika]] , a journalist and novelist († [[:en:1920|1920]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Uchida Kōsai|Uchida Yasuya]] , a diplomat and politician († [[:en:1936|1936]] ).
