<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿九]][[zh:九月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿九]][[zh:九月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿九]][[zh:九月廿九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840263]] Wikidata name: 29th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 29|qq=September 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199879}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|747|en|747|WD=Q409881|lt=747}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|WD=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|en|Shinagawa Yajirō|WD=Q7398823|lt=Shinagawa Yajirō}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|en|1900|WD=Q2034|lt=1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|WD=Q7698|lt=1862}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Shūroku|en|Kuroiwa Shūroku|WD=Q11179052|lt=Kuroiwa Ruika}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|en|1920|WD=Q2155|lt=1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Kōsai|en|Uchida Kōsai|WD=Q248015|lt=Uchida Yasuya}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|en|1936|WD=Q18649|lt=1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō (era)|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Daigo}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|en|885|WD=Q24894|lt=885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|949|en|949|WD=Q24352|lt=949}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yōzei|en|Emperor Yōzei|WD=Q349280|lt=Yōsei}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|en|868|WD=Q25061|lt=868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|en|Oda Nobuhiro|WD=Q1188472|lt=Oda Nobuhide}} , a military commander. * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1712|en|1712|WD=Q6871|lt=1712}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagihara Sukenori|1=Sukekado Yanagiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534159}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō (era)|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Daigo}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|en|885|WD=Q24894|lt=885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|949|en|949|WD=Q24352|lt=949}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yōzei|en|Emperor Yōzei|WD=Q349280|lt=Yōsei}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|en|868|WD=Q25061|lt=868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|en|Oda Nobuhiro|WD=Q1188472|lt=Oda Nobuhide}} , a military commander. * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1712|en|1712|WD=Q6871|lt=1712}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagihara Sukenori|1=Sukekado Yanagiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534159}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿九]][[zh:九月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿九]][[zh:九月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿九]][[zh:九月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 29|qq=September 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199879}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|747|en|747|WD=Q409881|lt=747}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|WD=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|en|Shinagawa Yajirō|WD=Q7398823|lt=Shinagawa Yajirō}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|en|1900|WD=Q2034|lt=1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|WD=Q7698|lt=1862}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Shūroku|en|Kuroiwa Shūroku|WD=Q11179052|lt=Kuroiwa Ruika}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|en|1920|WD=Q2155|lt=1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Kōsai|en|Uchida Kōsai|WD=Q248015|lt=Uchida Yasuya}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|en|1936|WD=Q18649|lt=1936}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō (era)|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Daigo}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|en|885|WD=Q24894|lt=885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|949|en|949|WD=Q24352|lt=949}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yōzei|en|Emperor Yōzei|WD=Q349280|lt=Yōsei}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|en|868|WD=Q25061|lt=868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|en|Oda Nobuhiro|WD=Q1188472|lt=Oda Nobuhide}} , a military commander. * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1712|en|1712|WD=Q6871|lt=1712}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagihara Sukenori|1=Sukekado Yanagiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534159}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199879}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|747|en|747|WD=Q409881|lt=747}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|WD=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō (era)|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō (era)|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|930|en|930|WD=Q23409|lt=930}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Daigo}} , in his 60s (* {{ill|885|en|885|WD=Q24894|lt=885}} ). * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|949|en|949|WD=Q24352|lt=949}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yōzei|en|Emperor Yōzei|WD=Q349280|lt=Yōsei}} , the 57th emperor (* {{ill|868|en|868|WD=Q25061|lt=868}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|en|Oda Nobuhiro|WD=Q1188472|lt=Oda Nobuhide}} , a military commander. * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1712|en|1712|WD=Q6871|lt=1712}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ） – {{ill|Yanagihara Sukenori|ja|柳原資廉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagihara Sukenori|1=Sukekado Yanagiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534159}} , a court noble (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|WD=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|WD=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga}} , a kokugakusha (* {{ill|1730|en|1730|WD=Q6957|lt=1730}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199879}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|747|en|747|WD=Q409881|lt=747|1=747}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6|1=November 6}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203|1=1203}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4|1=November 4}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|WD=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie|1=Minamoto no Yoriie}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28|1=October 28}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20|1=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|en|Shinagawa Yajirō|WD=Q7398823|lt=Shinagawa Yajirō|1=Shinagawa Yajirō}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|en|1900|WD=Q2034|lt=1900|1=1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|WD=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20|1=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Shūroku|en|Kuroiwa Shūroku|WD=Q11179052|lt=Kuroiwa Ruika|1=Kuroiwa Shūroku}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|en|1920|WD=Q2155|lt=1920|1=1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Kōsai|en|Uchida Kōsai|WD=Q248015|lt=Uchida Yasuya|1=Uchida Kōsai}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|en|1936|WD=Q18649|lt=1936|1=1936}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} , then this is the last day of the month; if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} , then it is the second-last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1199879}} 19th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|747|en|747|WD=Q409881|lt=747|1=747}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6|1=November 6}} ） – The casting of the giant Buddha at Tōdai-ji began. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203|1=1203}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4|1=November 4}} ） – Regent {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} confined Shogun {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|WD=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie|1=Minamoto no Yoriie}} to Izu ({{Izu Shūzenji|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} ） – Due to the Xinyou Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} to {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28|1=October 28}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} , the 15th shōgun of the Edo Shogunate († {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year（閏9月）（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20|1=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Shinagawa Yajirō|en|Shinagawa Yajirō|WD=Q7398823|lt=Shinagawa Yajirō|1=Shinagawa Yajirō}} , a Chōshū retainer and politician († {{ill|1900|en|1900|WD=Q2034|lt=1900|1=1900}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|WD=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20|1=November 20}} ） – {{ill|Kuroiwa Shūroku|en|Kuroiwa Shūroku|WD=Q11179052|lt=Kuroiwa Ruika|1=Kuroiwa Shūroku}} , a journalist and novelist († {{ill|1920|en|1920|WD=Q2155|lt=1920|1=1920}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Uchida Kōsai|en|Uchida Kōsai|WD=Q248015|lt=Uchida Yasuya|1=Uchida Kōsai}} , a diplomat and politician († {{ill|1936|en|1936|WD=Q18649|lt=1936|1=1936}} ).
